reasoning: Drake is highly unlikely to be the #1 most-streamed Spotify artist for 2025. He accumulated 7 billion streams by July 19, 2025, which projects his year-end total to roughly 12-13 billion streams. This is significantly below the typical performance of the #1 overall artist in recent years (e.g., Taylor Swift had 26 billion streams in 2023; Bad Bunny had 18.5 billion in 2022). Furthermore, the evidence indicating Drake was the #1 most-streamed artist for six consecutive months explicitly limits this to '(all credits)'. Spotify Wrapped ranks typically emphasize lead-artist credits, an area where Drake may trail competitors like Taylor Swift or The Weeknd. Speaking of The Weeknd, his album 'Hurry Up Tomorrow' had a larger streaming debut in early 2025 than Drake's collaborative project. Given Drake has not claimed the #1 spot globally since 2018 and has robust competition from The Weeknd's blockbuster album and Taylor Swift's immense back catalog, his chances of topping the 2025 Spotify Wrapped list are very low.
batch_queries: Will Drake be the top Spotify artist for 2025?
